changelog: Fixed Decade cards rendering as portrait slivers with vertical stacked text on TVs that output at lower density (Shield 720p mode etc). Switched HomeYearsRow from `Row + weight(1f)` to `LazyRow` with fixed 240 dp width cards — they now render at intended size regardless of TV resolution and the user can scroll horizontally if there are more cards than fit.
Fixed clicking a Decade card on the home page going to the empty generic browse screen — now navigates to the curated decadeyears/{playlistId}/{startYear} screen (matching mobile behaviour).
Added maxLines=1 and softWrap=false on the year text + MOVIES chip as a belt-and-braces guard so the text never wraps into vertical letter stacks even if a parent constraint goes wrong.
